text: The quietly humming energy of this place wraps me in a sense of possibility. Outside, the corridors are sterile and practical, but just beyond the glass, the vibrant exhibit beckons—a realm where ideas are more real than objects. I feel anticipation and curiosity, aware of being on the threshold of something intended to inspire thinking about human interaction with technology. I am both visitor and participant, drawn by the tension between clinical order and immersive invitation.
